subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Lord! Thou verily knowest and seest, observest and bearest witness to the tribulations that have successively befallen Thy servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی انک لتعلم و تری و تشاهد و تشهد الشدائد التی تتابعت علی عبدک
subcodes.subjects: @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
